title: levieria orientalis
intro: Leveria orientalis, also known as the 'Leveria' or 'Levieria', is a plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The Leveria orientalis is believed to offer several health benefits, including relief from fever, cold, and respiratory problems, as well as protection against infections and inflammation. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal use, and its herbal preparations are also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
